description: IDE-style agents on shared FS — no coord vs FS-watcher Synapse shim
harness: Two FSWatcher instances on a shared tempdir, each attributing to a different agent_id (alice, bob). Models two concurrent Claude Code or Cursor sessions in the same repo.

notes: No detection. Alice's models.py work is silently lost when Bob overwrites.

C7_fs_watcher.strategy: FS-watcher Synapse shim emits JSONL audit events
notes: FS watcher catches structural collisions with ~100% recall on this test.
Attribution noise: each watcher sees every change in the dir, so both watchers attribute the same physical write to different agents. The audit still detects the cross-agent collision correctly.
For clean attribution, use the Claude Code BeforeTool/AfterTool hook (synapse-pretooluse.py) — runs in agent context with SYNAPSE_AGENT_ID env var.
Belief-divergence detection: NOT possible via FS-watcher alone (cannot inspect LLM call output). For belief detection in IDE flows, use the live SDK adapters where available.
